name: Ricardo Ramos Rodríguez
background: Mr. Ramos joined the Company in 1989. He has served as our Chief Executive Officer since January 1, 2019. Previously, he served as our Chief Financial Officer and as our Vice President of Corporate Development and Business Development. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

commpanies.name: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A.
